For Monika

A birthday gift, with love

✦   Touch to open   ✦

✦   With Love   ✦

Happy Birthday to you, Super Mummy ♡

You are the heart of this family, and we are so lucky to have you

Every good thing in this family began with you

You have carried us all with grace, patience, and quiet strength

Your love has always been our greatest comfort and our greatest strength

Your laughter fills our home with something no one else ever could

We are so proud to call you ours, more than words can hold

You make every ordinary day feel like something worth remembering

Thank you for everything you do, everything you are, everything you give

Here's to you, Monika. The most beautiful soul we know.

Happy Birthday, Super Mummy ♡
❮
❯

Dearest Super Mummyaka "Monika"

From your family  ✦  With all our love
